sequence.title: TraderFrame - Evidence Gate
sequence.description: A premium interactive 3D narrative that demonstrates TraderFrame's evidence-first decision process. The sequence shows how fragmented market evidence is filtered, challenged, approved, and recorded transparently to form credible market conviction.

sequence_steps.title: The Fragmented Market
sequence_steps.description: A chaotic visual representation of fragmented market data—news tickers, price charts, social media sentiment, and analyst reports—flooding the screen. The user is shown as a trader in a high-stakes environment, overwhelmed by the volume of information.
sequence_steps.interaction: User can click on any data point to see its source and relevance.

sequence_steps.title: Filtering the Noise
sequence_steps.description: The screen transitions to a clean, structured interface where the user filters the data through a series of logical steps—timeframe, source credibility, and relevance. The interface highlights key evidence with visual indicators.
sequence_steps.interaction: User can toggle filters and see real-time impact on data visibility.

sequence_steps.title: Challenging the Evidence
sequence_steps.description: The user is shown engaging with a challenge panel where they can question the validity of each piece of evidence. A counterpoint appears, and the user can choose to accept, reject, or refine the evidence with additional data.
sequence_steps.interaction: User can select and modify evidence with real-time feedback.

sequence_steps.description: The interface transitions to a confirmation panel where the user reviews the final set of approved evidence. Each item is visually marked with a 'verified' badge, and the user can see the full chain of reasoning that led to the approval.
sequence_steps.interaction: User can view the full reasoning chain and export the evidence.

sequence_steps.title: Recording the Decision
sequence_steps.description: The user is shown creating a structured decision record—complete with time-stamped evidence, reasoning, and risk assessment. The interface visually represents the decision as a 'decision tree' with branches for risk scenarios and outcomes.
sequence_steps.interaction: User can save, share, or export the decision record.

sequence_steps.title: Market Conviction
sequence_steps.description: The final shot shows the user's decision being implemented in the market. A clean, calm interface displays the trade execution, with real-time performance metrics and a visual representation of the decision's impact on risk and reward.
sequence_steps.interaction: User can view performance analytics and adjust the decision if needed.

call_to_action.prompt: Explore the full sequence to experience TraderFrame's evidence-first decision process in action.
